name: io.github.TakoData/tako-mcp
title: Tako
description: Search, answer, and fetch Tako's knowledge base of 100K+ data charts, plus deep research agents.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Tako API token as a Bearer credential, e.g. `Bearer <token>` (CLI/desktop hosts such as Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf). Get one at tako.com -> account settings -> API tokens. Web hosts (Claude.ai, ChatGPT) use the server's OAuth flow instead, so this header is optional.
